title: pristimera tetramera
intro: Pristimera tetramera, also known as the White Flower Vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pristimera tetramera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making a tea infusion or a decoction, and it is also used in some herbal remedies for its purported antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties.
